SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Winkler, Esq. for Appellant/ Defendant Eugenio Tavares Santos, who is present.
Robert P. Sievers, Esq. for Respondent/ Plaintiff Angeline Chen, who is peresent.
This case having been assigned for court trial comes on calendar this day for Trial de Novo.
All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Angeline Chen is examined by counsel and testifies on her own behalf, Respondent / Plaintiff.
documentary evidence is introduced:
A. Signed Retainer Agreement
B. Letters of Correspondence
C. Email corresponcence
D. Text message exchange
E. Transcription of Voice Mail
F. Phone Bill
G. Documents pertaining to co-counsel Amie Miller.
Cross examination by Peter Winkler.
The Respondent / Plaintiff rest.
Eugenio Santos is examined by counsel and testifies on his own behalf.
Cross examination by Robert Sievers.

The Court accepts all previously identified exhibits admitted during the small claim hearing.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
